audit_items.proof_trace: The outer guard at line 385 (`if (updatedAt < minTimestamp && feedInfo.usdDataFeed != address(0))`) is the sole entry point to the Data Feed branch; when `updatedAt >= minTimestamp` (Streams not stale) this block is entirely skipped. Price and updatedAt remain initialized to Streams values (lines 381-382), so Data Feed is never consulted. No overrides of the `virtual` function exist in the codebase, confirming the guard is universally applied.
